SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

THIS SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT (the "SPA") is made on this 1st day of November 2023 by and between:

1. Dr. John Tan, NRIC No. S2345678F, residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 238888, contact number +65 9123 4567, email: johntan@example.sg.

2. Lionheart Ventures Pte. Ltd., a company incorporated in Singapore with UEN T12LL3456A, having its registered office at 456 Raffles Place, Singapore 048616.

WHEREAS, Dr. John Tan agrees to sell and Lionheart Ventures Pte. Ltd. agrees to purchase 10,000 ordinary shares of TanTech Solutions Pte. Ltd. for a total consideration of SGD 500,000.

Note: This SPA does not include any project plan or project status updates within its terms.

For further reference, see https://example.sg/user/S2345678F.

Each reference to the SPA herein shall mean this Share Purchase Agreement.
